sql.trim: t1.ID, t1.ZBID, t1.CR00312001, t1.CR00313001, t1.CR00314001, t1.CR00315001, t1.CR00316001, t1.CR00317001, t1.CR00318001, t1.CR00319001, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.VERSION, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.SECRET_LEVEL, t1.OPERATION_TYPE_, t1.SYS_APPLICATION_ID, t1.LOG_APP_ID,

mapper.insert:
insert into CMJT_SUBJECT_INFO
ID,
ZBID,
CR00312001,
CR00313001,
CR00314001,
CR00315001,
CR00316001,
CR00317001,
CR00318001,
CR00319001,
CREATED_BY,
CREATED_DEPT,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
ORG_IDENTITY,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID,
LOG_APP_ID,
VERSION,
OPERATION_TYPE,
SECRET_LEVEL,
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{zbid,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{cr00312001,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{cr00313001,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{cr00314001,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{cr00315001,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{cr00316001,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{cr00317001,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{cr00318001,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{cr00319001,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{logAppId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into CMJT_SUBJECT_INFO( ID , ZBID , CR00312001 , CR00313001 , CR00314001 , CR00315001 , CR00316001 , CR00317001 , CR00318001 , CR00319001 , CREATED_BY , CREATED_DEPT , CREATION_DATE , LAST_UPDATED_BY , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , LAST_UPDATE_IP , ORG_IDENTITY , SYS_APPLICATION_ID , LOG_APP_ID , VERSION , OPERATION_TYPE , SECRET_LEVEL )
select #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.zbid,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.cr00312001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.cr00313001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.cr00314001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.cr00315001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.cr00316001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.cr00317001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.cr00318001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.cr00319001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.logAppId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update CMJT_SUBJECT_INFO
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ZBID = #{zbid,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00312001 = #{cr00312001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00313001 = #{cr00313001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00314001 = #{cr00314001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00315001 = #{cr00315001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CR00316001 = #{cr00316001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CR00317001 = #{cr00317001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CR00318001 = #{cr00318001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CR00319001 = #{cr00319001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID = #{sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
LOG_APP_ID = #{logAppId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
VERSION = version+1 ,
OPERATION_TYPE = #{operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SECRET_LEVEL = #{secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR}
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update CMJT_SUBJECT_INFO set ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ZBID = #{item.zbid,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CR00312001 = #{item.cr00312001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CR00313001 = #{item.cr00313001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CR00314001 = #{item.cr00314001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CR00315001 = #{item.cr00315001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , CR00316001 = #{item.cr00316001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , CR00317001 = #{item.cr00317001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , CR00318001 = #{item.cr00318001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , CR00319001 = #{item.cr00319001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SYS_APPLICATION_ID = #{item.sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LOG_APP_ID = #{item.logAppId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , OPERATION_TYPE = #{item.operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SECRET_LEVEL = #{item.secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}

mapper.delete:
delete from CMJT_SUBJECT_INFO where id in
#{id}
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO CMJT_SUBJECT_INFO t1 USING dual ON(t1.ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
ZBID = #{zbid,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00312001 = #{cr00312001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00313001 = #{cr00313001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00314001 = #{cr00314001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00315001 = #{cr00315001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CR00316001 = #{cr00316001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CR00317001 = #{cr00317001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CR00318001 = #{cr00318001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CR00319001 = #{cr00319001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID = #{sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
LOG_APP_ID = #{logAppId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
VERSION = version+1 ,
OPERATION_TYPE = #{operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SECRET_LEVEL = #{secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR}
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT
ID,
ZBID,
CR00312001,
CR00313001,
CR00314001,
CR00315001,
CR00316001,
CR00317001,
CR00318001,
CR00319001,
CREATED_BY,
CREATED_DEPT,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
ORG_IDENTITY,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID,
LOG_APP_ID,
VERSION,
OPERATION_TYPE,
BUSINESS_ID,
SECRET_LEVEL,
